# Munters — Humidity Control for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## HCD Series Desiccant Dehumidifier
- 300-12,000 CFM across 8 models
- Dew points down to -55F
- Aluminum zero-leak casing
- Allen Bradley PLC controls
- Reactivation: gas, electric, steam, or waste heat

## HCD Plus (Turnkey Skid)
- Integrated dampers, filtration, cooling, heating
- Drop-in solution

## Why Desiccant (NOT Compressor) for AI Factories
- Precision to +/-1F dew point
- Prevents condensation on cold cooling lines
- Corrosion prevention for copper bus bars
- No condensate drain failures
- Can use waste heat for reactivation (free energy from GPU exhaust)
- Compressors can't hit the low dew points needed around liquid-cooled racks

## For ADC 3K Pod
- HCD-2500 Plus recommended
- Maintains ASHRAE A1 conditions inside sealed container
- Solar roof powers dehumidifier during peak humidity

## Product page: munters.com/en-us/products-cms/dehumidifiers/hcd-series/
